entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company that uses high-friction storytelling processes for candidate evaluation

entities.name: Careerspan story
entities.context: High-friction, high-reflection task candidates engage with to demonstrate quality and intent

entities.name: Costly signaling
entities.context: Evolutionary biology principle: reliable signals must be difficult to fake or expensive to produce

entities.name: Proof-of-work mechanisms
entities.context: Self-selection filters requiring cognitive effort rather than transactional data entry

entities.name: High-agency individuals
entities.context: Candidates filtered for through cognitive effort barriers who demonstrate diligence and motivation

entities.name: Completion as signal
entities.context: Belief that willingness to complete high-friction tasks is higher-fidelity signal than content quality

entities.name: Protect the friction
entities.context: Principle that friction in processes should be preserved to maintain signal quality, not optimized away

relationships.context: Core evaluation tool in Careerspan's candidate assessment process
Functions as a proof-of-work filter for candidates
Proof-of-work embodies costly signaling principle from evolutionary biology
Creates self-selection that filters for high-agency candidates
Should protect friction in storytelling process rather than optimizing for ease of use
Should weight completion event as heavily as completion quality in evaluation
